title: Newton's First Law
description: Explore inertia with a quick coin trick.

dialogue.text: Hi! I'm Orion. Want to see inertia in action? Grab a logbook to record observations.

options.text: Yes! Hand me a mission logbook.

dialogue.text: Place a coin on the logbook, then flick the book sideways. The coin stays due to inertia.
Objects resist changes in motion. That's Newton's first law in a nutshell.
